label: India Fiscal Pressure Tracker
methodology: Estimated live counter between official budget snapshots

comparisonCountries.name: India
comparisonCountries.takeaway: Lower than Japan and the US, but fiscal room is tighter because India needs growth-heavy spending and has less reserve-currency flexibility.

comparisonCountries.name: China
comparisonCountries.takeaway: China carries higher public debt, but the bigger issue is local-government and hidden off-balance-sheet debt.

comparisonCountries.name: US
comparisonCountries.takeaway: The US can carry more debt because the dollar remains the global reserve currency. India does not have that privilege.

comparisonCountries.name: Japan
comparisonCountries.takeaway: Japan’s debt is far higher, but most of it is domestically held and strongly supported by the Bank of Japan.
